name: Workplace Love language
description: Workplace love languages describe how employees prefer to be recognized, supported, and appreciated professionally, adapted from the original five love languages to improve team culture, retention, and morale. The five types are Words of Affirmation, Quality Time, Acts of Service, Receiving Gifts, and Physical Touch (or appropriate, professional closeness) , the app analysis you love language at work and provied the user with  insight and action items how to improve teams communication
